channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Pumpkin-MC /Pumpkin | Rust | N/A
item.description: Empowering everyone to host fast and efficient Minecraft servers.

item.title: hyprwm /Hyprland | C++ | N/A
item.description: Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn't sacrifice on its looks.

item.title: DioxusLabs /dioxus | Rust | N/A
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: dreamhunter2333 /cloudflare_temp_email | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

item.title: tirth8205 /code-review-graph | Python | N/A
item.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: agegr /pi-web | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Web UI for the pi coding agent

item.title: ComposioHQ /awesome-claude-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

item.title: shiyu-coder /Kronos | Python | N/A
item.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: diegosouzapw /OmniRoute | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors

item.title: jamiepine /voicebox | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: chrislgarry /Apollo-11 | Assembly | N/A
item.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: likec4 /likec4 | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

item.title: schollz /croc | Go | N/A
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: ayghri /i-have-adhd | Python | N/A
item.description: A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: koala73 /worldmonitor | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
